title: Pauridiantha insularis
taxonomy: Pauridiantha insularis is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Within the family Rubiaceae, Pauridiantha insularis is further classified within the tribe Rubieae. The genus Pauridiantha is a part of the subfamily Rubioideae. The exact classification of Pauridiantha insularis is still a subject of ongoing research and study in botany.
uses: Pauridiantha insularis is known to have several medicinal uses in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa.
